title: On the Phone: Calls & Video Conferences
subtitle: Make and answer business calls and join video conferences
fit:
<!-- SCENARIO FIT — Aula 8
Can-do: "I can make and answer business calls and join video conferences."
Gramatica-alvo: telephone/video-call language + Can/Could (revisado da L4/L6, aplicado a chamadas).
Vocab-alvo: call back, hold on, voicemail, mute, unmute, connection, hang up, dial.
Cenario escolhido: Rafael atende uma ligacao e entra numa videoconferencia com a parceira Sarah e o time.
Por que elicita o alvo: a chamada OBRIGA frases de telefone/video e pedidos com Can/Could. Aderencia >= 90%.
-->
<!-- CONTINUIDADE — Aula 8
Itens novos: call back, hold on, voicemail, mute, unmute, connection, hang up, dial; phone/video phrases.
Itens revisados (1-7): Could/Can (pedidos, L4/L6), marcar reuniao por e-mail (L7), apresentar-se (L1).
Callback no warm-up: slide 2 retoma a Aula 7 ('you wrote an email to set up a meeting; today you make the call') e usa Could.
-->
